Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Continued To Feb-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shirley Tam appeared by telephone for Jocasta Wong.

The Court informed Ms. Tam that it is still waiting for courtesy copies the petition, a proposed order and the notice of hearing of the petition for approval of the status report. The Court also informed Ms. Tam that this issue has been addressed in the last two tentative rulings, and that if this petition is no longer current, she can file an amended petition. Ms. Tam stated that she provided copies of the 850 Petition, that she will have her staff mail copies of the status report to the Probate Examiner, and that she feels it is prudent for the Court to have an amended report so that it is aware of what is happening with the property. The Report on Status of Administration is continued to February 19, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
